title: Botanist
content:
Go thou to thy learned task,
    I stay with the flowers of Spring:
    Do thou of the Ages ask
    What me the Hours will bring.
meaning:
Ralph Waldo Emerson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Botanist"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
